description_long: This helmet features a robust, rounded shell with a prominent vertical blue stripe running from the front to the back, bordered by a stippled, weathered effect. The front faceplate is angular, with a black horizontal visor slit and two vertical black accents extending downward, giving it a futuristic, tactical appearance. The sides of the helmet have circular indents and subtle paneling, while the rear is reinforced with a central circular detail and additional geometric ridges. The lower front edge is detailed with a series of small, rectangular vent-like shapes, and the back includes a set of horizontal slits for possible ventilation. The surface finish is mostly matte with some areas appearing slightly smoother, and the color palette is dominated by white, blue, and black. The overall design is reminiscent of science fiction or military helmets, offering both protection and a visually striking presence.
description: A white helmet with a bold blue vertical stripe, black visor slit, and angular, futuristic detailing. Features weathered paint effects and geometric paneling.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue stripe, black visor slit, vertical black accents, and vent-like details at the chin.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlights the rounded shell, blue stripe continuation, circular side indent, and rear paneling.
description_view_2: Back view displays the central circular detail, geometric ridges, and the full length of the blue stripe.
description_view_3: Opposite rear-side view reveals the other circular side indent, rear slits, and the helmet's overall curvature.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Front lower edge has a row of small rectangular vents; rear has a set of horizontal slits; no other visible vents.
attribute_graphic_design: Vertical blue stripe with stippled, weathered edges; otherwise solid white with black accents.
